Name: DevFlow — Developer Dashboard
Excerpt: A developer productivity dashboard that integrates with GitHub, Jira, and Slack to provide a unified view of your development workflow. Built with real-time updates and customizable widgets.

Name: MarkdownMail
Excerpt: Write emails in Markdown and send them beautifully formatted. Supports templates, scheduled sending, and a clean distraction-free writing experience with live preview.

Name: APIBench
Excerpt: A lightweight API benchmarking tool that helps you measure response times, throughput, and reliability of your REST and GraphQL endpoints. Generates beautiful HTML reports with charts.

Name: Dotfiles Manager
Excerpt: A CLI tool for managing and syncing dotfiles across machines. Supports encrypted secrets, machine-specific configs, and automatic backup to a git repository.

Name: Notecraft
Excerpt: A local-first note-taking app with Markdown support, backlinks, graph view, and full-text search. Inspired by Obsidian but built as a web app with offline-first architecture.

Name: PixelSort
Excerpt: An image glitch art tool that applies pixel sorting algorithms to photos. Choose from various sorting modes (brightness, hue, saturation) and apply masks for selective effects.
